allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('oauthAccount:', bool\(d.get\('oauthAccount'\)\)\); print\('primaryApiKey:', bool\(d.get\('primaryApiKey'\)\)\)")

PowerShell($content = Get-Content "C:\\Users\\stans\\.claude.json" -Raw -Encoding UTF8; Write-Host "Rozmiar: $\($content.Length\) znaków"; try { $d = $content | ConvertFrom-Json; Write-Host "oauthAccount: $\($null -ne $d.oauthAccount\)"; Write-Host "primaryApiKey: $\($null -ne $d.primaryApiKey -and $d.primaryApiKey -ne ''\)"; } catch { Write-Host "Błąd JSON: $_"; Write-Host "Pierwsze 300 znaków: $\($content.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(300, $content.Length\)\)\)" })
